handoff.salientSummary: The Tauri renderer can now invoke the Eventa window get-bounds contract and receive the real WebviewWindow outer position/size from Rust. The stage window displays the returned bounds alongside Runtime: Tauri for page-level acceptance evidence.
handoff.whatWasImplemented: Added a Tauri native invoke bridge in @proj-airi/tauri-eventa that intercepts Eventa invoke send events, maps eventa:invoke:electron:window:get-bounds to the registered electron_window_get_bounds Tauri command, and emits the matching inbound Eventa receive/error event. Exported useTauriEventaInvoke for app consumers. Added a focused adapter test and a compact bounds readout to apps/stage-tauri.
handoff.whatWasLeftUndone: Only get-bounds is verified end to end in this feature. Additional window/screen commands with request payloads, lifecycle events, and reactive bounds composables remain in later mission features.

commandsRun.observation: RED check timed out before implementation because Eventa defineInvoke emitted a send event that never produced a receive event.
7 tests passed after the native invoke bridge mapped get-bounds to electron_window_get_bounds.
tsdown build passed and regenerated local ignored dist output for dependent app typechecking.
vue-tsc and vite build passed with existing DuckDB/browser externalization and large chunk warnings.
Init script passed and cargo check completed with known placeholder dead-code warnings.
Rust build passed with the known five placeholder dead-code warnings.
Tauri dev app launched on Wayland. Screenshot showed Live2D stage with Runtime: Tauri and Bounds: 0, 0, 946 x 1030.

interactiveChecks.result: Screenshot /tmp/stage-tauri-bounds.png showed the Tauri window rendering the Live2D character and bounds values returned through the Tauri invoke path.

tests.coverage: Adapter test covers defineInvoke(context, electron.window.getBounds) mapping to electron_window_get_bounds and resolving the returned bounds payload. Runtime screenshot covers the page-visible Tauri bounds readout.

discoveredIssues.description: The previous adapter test called internals.invoke directly and did not prove renderer Eventa invokes reached registered Tauri commands.
MCP Serena/jcodemunch tools required by AGENTS.md were unavailable, so native tooling fallback was used and recorded.
Runtime dev output still includes existing intlify HTML warning and DuckDB sourcemap warnings unrelated to this feature.

deviations.step: AGENTS.md MCP startup and delegated code-change loop
deviations.whatIDidInstead: Used native rg/sed/git/apply_patch/pnpm/cargo/grim tooling and structured JSON edits.
deviations.why: The MCP tools named by AGENTS.md were not exposed in the current tool list.
